actions.name: Docker Images For Repo Handling
actions.description: Builds and pushes Docker images for various Armbian distributions based on a generated matrix of supported releases and architectures. It sets up the necessary environment, creates Dockerfiles, and utilizes Docker Buildx for multi-platform builds. Finally, it generates a summary of the built images and pushes them to the GitHub Container Registry.
actions.cron_schedule: at 30 minutes past the hour, at 3:00

actions.name: Docker Images for Framework
actions.description: Updates Docker images used for building CI by generating Dockerfiles and building multi-architecture images. Builds and pushes images for various OS and architecture combinations, then creates multi-arch manifests to consolidate them. Ensures images are up-to-date and accessible in the GitHub Container Registry.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 3:00
